## Summary

Describe the change.

## Why

Explain the user or contributor benefit.

## Validation

- [ ] Checked `SKILL.md` frontmatter and folder name.
- [ ] Checked that no private photo artifacts are staged.
- [ ] Updated docs or changelog if useful.

## Safety

- [ ] Preserves originals by default.
- [ ] Keeps JPG and RAW/NEF pairs together or flags exceptions.
- [ ] Does not add deletion, overwrite, upload, or publish behavior without explicit approval.
